title: LEGO Harry Potter Privet Drive: Aunt Marge's Visit – Toy House with a Detailed Interior, 5 Minifigures & Inflated Aunt Marge Figure - Prisoner of Azkaban Gift for 8+ Year Old Girls & Boys - 76451
features: Enchanting house toy to build – LEGO Harry Potter collectible building toy for 8+ year old girls and boys lets kids relive Aunt Marge’s visit to Vernon Dursley's home at 4 Privet Drive
5 LEGO Harry Potter minifigures – Harry Potter, Marge Dursley, Vernon Dursley, Petunia Dursley and Dudley Dursley, plus an inflated Aunt Marge LEGO Harry Potter figure and Ripper the dog
Iconic location – The LEGO house features a conservatory and opens to reveal a kitchen, a dining area with a removable table, a living room, Dudley’s room and Harry’s bedroom
Authentic details – This buildable Harry Potter toy features a secret door to the cupboard under the stairs, removable window bars, ‘Privet Drive' sign, lamppost, and more
Harry Potter gift for Wizarding World fans – This LEGO Harry Potter set makes a fun birthday gift for 8+ year old girls, boys and any fan of the "Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban" movie
3D building instructions – The LEGO Builder app features intuitive tools that let builders zoom in, rotate models in 3D, track progress and save sets as they build skills
LEGO Harry Potter collectible – This fantasy playset is part of a wide collection of LEGO Harry Potter building sets (sold separately) for creative play and display
description: From the manufacturer Gift for Harry Potter fans Recreate an iconic location Build a detailed model of the Dursley family home at 4 Privet Drive and play out memorable Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban scenes with this LEGO Harry Potter toy for boys, girls and any fans. Magical playset Authentic details to inspire creative play The house is packed with instantly recognisable details, and the set also includes the ‘Privet Drive’ sign and lamppost, plus an inflated Aunt Marge figure to recreate the hilarious scene where Harry casts a spell on her. Previous page Kitchen/dining area The kitchen table is removable for easy play. Secret entrance Discover the secret door to Harry’s old bedroom under the stairs. Dudley’s bedroom Play games on Dudley’s computer… and raid his secret stash of sweets! Barred windows Pull the bars off Harry Potter’s bedroom window to help him escape. Designed for play Open out the house for easy access to all the interior rooms. LEGO Harry Potter minifigures Role-play spellbinding stories with Marge Dursley, Vernon Dursley, Petunia Dursley, Dudley Dursley and Harry Potter minifigures. Next page LEGO Builder Intuitive instructions Let the LEGO Builder app guide kids on an intuitive building adventure, with interactive tools that let them zoom in and rotate their model in 3D while they build, track progress and save sets. Collectible toys Explore the LEGO Harry Potter range This building toy is part of a huge assortment of LEGO Harry Potter sets (sold separately), which let fans play out iconic scenes, create new stories or simply display the authentically detailed models. Previous page Knight Bus Adventure All aboard the Knight Bus to recreate thrilling Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban scenes with this magical toy building set for kids. Quality Quidditch Supplies & Ice Cream Parlour Let your young wizard, witch or Muggle join Ron Weasley and Cho Chang for a magical shopping trip in Diagon Alley. Malfoy Manor Build the first-ever LEGO brick model of the iconic Malfoy Manor with this LEGO Harry Potter toy for creative boys, girls and superfans. Hogwarts Castle: The Main Tower Break free from the Devil’s Snare, play Wizard Chess and more with the largest minifigure-scale model (at launch) of the Main Tower at Hogwarts Castle. Next page
